pageContext.name: Hovertank Pilot 1oz Silver coin
pageContext.description: Time for our next coin in the Faces of the Empire Collection – the Hovertank Pilot™! These specialized, Imperial combat assault tank pilots were created and developed for the 2016 film Rogue One: A Star Wars Story™.  These pure silver coins follow the shape and color of the Hovertank Pilot's helmet, additional light relief to the face give it an incredible 3D-feel. This unique collectible arrives packaged inside a compact and modern Star Wars™-branded case with a large window for ease of display. The Certificate of Authenticity on the back of the case features the coin's unique number in the limited 10,000 mintage.
